text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 a.m. and start with a glass of water and light stretching. After a quick shower, I have a healthy breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My work schedule begins at 9 a.m., and I spend the morning focusing on tasks like meetings or writing. I take a short lunch break at noon, then continue working until 5 p.m. In the late afternoon, I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga at home. Evenings are for relaxing—I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. I’m in bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine keeps me productive and balanced, and I try to follow it consistently every day.
